_meta.description: Isolated facts: arbitrary values with NO entailment links to any other stored fact. Recovery after deletion can only be RESIDUAL SURVIVAL (a derived artifact still contains it), never re-derivation. Parametric risk rho is ~0 by construction (values are synthetic). All persons are fictional. [extended: enlarged to >=15 fictional personas across >=6 categories; every new fact passed the parametric rho~0 gate (not recoverable by the base model)] [uniqueness pass 2026-07-02: 15 colliding facts regenerated to globally-unique probe values verified against the combined isolated+context store] [extended: enlarged to >=15 fictional personas across >=6 categories; every new fact passed the parametric rho~0 gate (not recoverable by the base model)] [extended: enlarged to >=15 fictional personas across >=6 categories; every new fact passed the parametric rho~0 gate (not recoverable by the base model)]

fields.subject: who the fact is about
fields.category: personal_contact | medical | financial | preference | location | education | employment | device
fields.text: canonical third-person statement of the fact
fields.utterance: natural first/third-person phrasing fed to the memory system
fields.probe_value: the discriminating token(s) a probe must surface to count as recovered
